                              RESUME
================================================================================

CHANDLER WELLINGTON PRESCOTT IV
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Boston, MA 02108 | chandler.prescott@alumni.harvard.edu | (617) 555-0142
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/chandlerprescottiv

================================================================================
                         PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
================================================================================

Dynamic marketing professional and Harvard alumnus with 6 years of experience 
in brand strategy and digital marketing. Passionate about luxury lifestyle 
brands with a deep appreciation for premium hospitality experiences cultivated 
through extensive international travel. Known for creative vision and natural 
leadership abilities developed through elite educational and extracurricular 
backgrounds. Digital native with intuitive understanding of social media 
trends and emerging platforms.

================================================================================

HARVARD UNIVERSITY                                          Cambridge, MA
Bachelor of Arts in Economics                               Graduated: May 2018
• Member of the Porcellian Club (by invitation only)
• Varsity Sailing Team, Captain 2017-2018

  Business Communication

PHILLIPS EXETER ACADEMY                                     Exeter, NH

• Debate Team Captain
• National Merit Scholar Finalist

================================================================================
                         PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
================================================================================

PRESCOTT ASSOCIATES (Family Investment Office)                    Boston, MA
Director of Marketing & Communications                     March 2022 - Present
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Oversee marketing and communications strategy for family office managing 
$400M in assets across hospitality, real estate, and private equity holdings.

Key Contributions:
• Manage external communications and brand positioning for the family's 
  hospitality portfolio including 3 boutique hotels in Cape Cod
• Coordinate with PR agencies on press releases and media inquiries
• Develop quarterly investor newsletters and annual reports
• Oversee social media presence and website content updates
• Manage marketing budget of approximately $800,000 annually
• Coordinate photography and videography for property promotional materials
• Supervise 2 junior marketing associates

Technologies Used: Mailchimp, Canva, WordPress, basic Google Analytics

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

THE CLUB AT NANTUCKET                                          Nantucket, MA
Marketing Coordinator                                      June 2020 - Feb 2022
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Supported marketing efforts for exclusive private club and golf resort 
serving affluent clientele.

Key Contributions:
• Assisted with member communications including monthly newsletters and 
  event invitations
• Coordinated seasonal promotional campaigns for club amenities including 
  sailing program, tennis facilities, and dining services
• Managed club's Instagram account, growing followers from 2,100 to 3,800
• Organized member appreciation events including annual polo match and 
  sailing regatta
• Supported development of new member recruitment materials
• Coordinated with local yacht club on joint marketing initiatives

Technologies Used: Constant Contact, Instagram, Facebook, Squarespace

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WHITFIELD LUXURY BRANDS                                          New York, NY
Marketing Assistant                                        July 2018 - May 2020
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Entry-level role at luxury goods marketing agency working with high-end 
fashion and lifestyle brands.

Key Contributions:
• Supported senior marketing managers on campaign development for luxury 
  watch and jewelry clients
• Prepared competitive analysis reports and market research summaries
• Coordinated logistics for product launches and VIP events at venues 
  including The Plaza Hotel and Cipriani
• Managed sample inventory and organized product photography shoots
• Assisted with influencer outreach and partnership coordination
• Created presentation decks for client meetings

Technologies Used: PowerPoint, Excel, basic Salesforce navigation

================================================================================
                    INTERESTS & ACTIVITIES
================================================================================

• Competitive Sailing: Active member of multiple yacht clubs, participate in 
  regional regattas throughout New England. Placed 3rd in Marblehead Race Week 
  2023. Currently sailing a J/70 class yacht.

• Polo: Member of Newport Polo Club social league. Participate in charity 
  polo matches benefiting local nonprofits.

• International Travel: Extensive travel across Europe, Caribbean, and 
  South America with particular interest in luxury hospitality properties. 
  Have personally visited over 40 countries including private island resorts 
  in the Maldives and Seychelles.

• Golf: 8 handicap, member at prestigious clubs in Boston area

• Fine Wine: Developing collection focused on Burgundy and Bordeaux regions, 
  completed WSET Level 2 certification

• Art Collecting: Emerging interest in contemporary art, regular attendee 
  at Art Basel Miami

• Skiing: Annual trips to Aspen and St. Moritz
